These areas were sanded, sealed and repainted. The t-molding was removed for this process, which was then cleaned and reinstalled. The black player-facing areas were all repainted and look perfect. The original sideart is all present and is in very good shape with no major gouges or defects. The marquee is original and in good shape. The original glass bezel artwork was stripped (flaking badly) and new repro reverse-printed artwork applied - looks a very nice-a. The control panel overlay is original and in very good shape, with only one small, tasteful cigarette burn in the upper right and some scuffing on the front. The panel itself was stripped of parts and the overlay cleaned with Awesome! and Magic Eraser to make those pinks and yellows really pop! The buttons and joystick were disassembled and cleaned. The bolts holding the joystick were also removed and burnished. The original coin door was disassembled, stripped and refinished and looks perfect! It can take quarters if you wish, as the coin box is present, but no locks are included. The original monitor has had the voltage properly adjusted and looks very good. Best thing is - IT'S BURN-FREE, a rarity for this title. Lastly, the original back door is included, with the instruction sheet AND the manual and schematics package. This is one of my favs - make it yours today! Cash and carry in Plano. Play before you pay. First floor, no stairs and I can help you load! :D
